item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 050530Z AUTO 26005KT 3300 +RA BR BKN002/// BKN006/// BKN010/// ///CB 13/13 Q1008 TEMPO OVC003
🟡 TAF LFOT 050500Z 0506/0606 25012KT 6000 -RA OVC009 TEMPO 0506/0510 4000 RA OVC003 BECMG 0509/0511 NSW SCT030 TEMPO 0514/0521 4500 -SHRA BKN015TCU PROB40 TEMPO 0514/0518 25015G30KT 3000 -TSRA BKN015CB BECMG 0600/0603 -RA OVC006
